news.t: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome ETFs® Lineup with the Launch of Two New Strategies, One Focused on Accelerated Growth Potential and the Other with a Downside Buffer

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Quarterly 2.5 to 15 Buffer ETF (DHDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to participate in the price movement of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF (ticker: SPY), up to a cap while buffering losses between -2.5% and -15%. The fund resets its buffer and cap levels quarterly DHDG was launched on Nov 3, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.

data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”) a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched the FT Vest U.S. Equit...
